name: Hydraulic Main Pump
description: High-pressure hydraulic pump for JCB 3CX/3DX and CAT 428F. Engineered for maximum lift capacity.

name: Engine Piston Ring Set
description: Standard size piston rings for Dieselmax engines. High thermal resistance.

name: Heavy Duty Track Roller
description: Heavy-duty track roller for medium excavators. Forged steel construction.

name: Primary Air Filter Element
description: High-capacity primary air filter element for dusty mining conditions.

name: Heavy Duty Starter Motor
description: 24V 4.5kW starter motor assembly. Anti-corrosion coating applied.

name: Standard Bucket Teeth
description: Standard sharp edge bucket tooth made of high tensile strength alloy.

name: Transmission Synchro Gearbox
description: 4-speed synchro shuttle gearbox. Fully tested and certified.

name: High Pressure Relief Valve
description: Main hydraulic system relief valve. Pre-calibrated for heavy lifting.
